title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 115.341 - Primary elections, when held
text:
115.341.  Primary elections, when held. — For the nomination of candidates to be elected at the next general election, a primary election shall be held on the first Tuesday after the first Monday in August of even-numbered years.
(L. 1977 H.B. 101 § 10.085) 
Effective 1-01-78
